examples: Today, I babysat my neighbour's spoilt bratty twins.
Although she has her bratty moments, she has a strong relationship with her mother, Melissa.
I do not underestimate the potential this product has. I know spoiled, bratty girls will buy this product just for the designer label.
Last week the right-leaning groups backing Jones looked more like bratty children than cogs in a well-oiled conspiracy machine.
Food Safety Manager Ivan Bratty said simple precautions must be taken.
